mapper.sql:
a.id AS "id", a.uid AS "u.id", a.icon AS "icon", a.name AS "name", a.idno AS "idno", a.qrcode AS "qrcode", a.gonggao AS "gonggao", a.open_qyyq AS "openQyyq", a.open_qyyz AS "openQyyz", a.open_qzhb AS "openQzhb", a.open_qzts AS "openQzts", a.open_qygl AS "openQygl", a.open_qysl AS "openQysl", a.open_qykj AS "openQykj", a.jiange AS "jiange", a.mgc AS "mgc", a.open_gmc AS "openGmc", a.all_jy AS "allJy", a.gtype AS "gtype", a.aikey AS "aikey", a.openpic AS "openpic", a.del_flag AS "delFlag", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate",
u.nickname AS "u.nickname", u.icon AS "u.icon", u.sex AS "u.sex"
LEFT JOIN t_member u ON u.id = a.uid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_group( id, uid, icon, `name`, idno, qrcode, gonggao, open_qyyq, open_qyyz, open_qzhb, open_qzts, open_qygl, open_qysl, open_qykj, jiange, mgc, open_gmc, all_jy, del_flag, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{u.id}, #{icon}, #{name}, #{idno}, #{qrcode}, #{gonggao}, #{openQyyq}, #{openQyyz}, #{openQzhb}, #{openQzts}, #{openQygl}, #{openQysl}, #{openQykj}, #{jiange}, #{mgc}, #{openGmc}, #{allJy}, #{delFlag}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
